specs.title: cp-000: Clicking Plans Billing shows the billing pane without changing the route
cp-001: Clicking Usage Tracking shows the usage pane without changing the route
cp-002: Clicking Preferences shows the preferences pane without changing the route
cp-003: Sidebar tab buttons remain enabled during normal idle state
cp-004: Log Out stays visible at the bottom of the sidebar while switching tabs
cp-005: Account tab renders a 64x64 circular avatar placeholder with a UserCircle icon
cp-006: Account summary heading shows userfull_name when present
cp-007: Account summary heading falls back to User when userfull_name is null
cp-008: Account summary email line shows useremail when present
cp-009: Account summary email line falls back to an empty string when no email is availa
cp-010: Verified Student badge is always rendered on the account tab in the current impl
cp-011: Verified Student badge includes a ShieldCheck icon and badge text on the same li
cp-012: Full Name label is rendered directly above the first text input
cp-013: Full Name input placeholder is Dr Jane Doe
cp-014: Full Name input is prefilled from userfull_name when profile data exists
cp-015: Full Name input falls back to an empty string when userfull_name is null
cp-016: Full Name input is a controlled input bound to profileName
cp-017: Full Name input has no required attribute in the current implementation
cp-018: Full Name input has no maxLength attribute in the current implementation
cp-019: Full Name input uses the shared focusring-2 focusring-brand40 focus style
cp-020: Specialty Institution label is rendered above the second text input
cp-021: Specialty Institution input placeholder is eg Cardiology AIIMS New Delhi
cp-022: Specialty Institution input is prefilled from userspecialty when profile data ex
cp-023: Specialty Institution input falls back to an empty string when userspecialty is
cp-024: Specialty Institution input is a controlled input bound to specialty
cp-025: Specialty Institution input has no required attribute in the current implementat
cp-026: Specialty Institution input has no maxLength attribute in the current implementa
cp-027: Specialty Institution input uses the shared focusring-2 focusring-brand40 focus
cp-028: Country label is rendered above the third text input
cp-029: Country input placeholder is eg India
cp-030: Country input is prefilled from usercountry when profile data exists
cp-031: Country input falls back to an empty string when usercountry is null
cp-032: Country input is a controlled input bound to country
cp-033: Country input has no required attribute in the current implementation
cp-034: Country input has no maxLength attribute in the current implementation
